Tip suggests using Jupiter Wallet for one-click trading with Auto-Approve enabled.", "action": "scroll", "reason": "현재 화면에는 Trading Mode와 Sounds Alerts(Notification Volume 50%, Buy Sound, Sell Sound)까지만 보인다.
